setup.title: Two-factor authentication
setup.intro: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password...), then enter the 6-digit code to confirm.
setup.manual_entry_label: Can't scan? Enter this key manually:
setup.success: 2FA has been enabled on your account.
setup.recovery_intro: Each code can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator. Store them somewhere safe — they won't be shown again.

challenge.title: Enter your 2FA code
challenge.description: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code for this account.
challenge.expired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
challenge.invalid: That code is invalid. Try again.

disable.title: Disable 2FA
disable.description: Enter your password to turn off two-factor authentication.
disable.error: Could not disable — check your password or code.

recovery.regenerate_confirm: Generating new codes invalidates the old ones. Continue?

setup_page.title: Set up two-factor authentication
setup_page.subtitle: Secure your account with a second step. Takes under a minute.
setup_page.enforced_banner: Your administrator requires two-factor authentication on admin accounts. You cannot access the admin panel until it's configured.
